name: lark-cli
description: Bundle existing Lark/Feishu lark-cli skills for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: 通过本机 lark-cli 操作飞书
interface.longDescription: Packaged and maintained by Sheldon. This plugin bundles the existing Feishu/Lark skills for lark-cli so Codex can use the same documented workflows for docs, wiki, sheets, base, calendar, IM, mail, approval, tasks, whiteboards, meetings, and OpenAPI exploration.
defaultPrompt: 用飞书云文档创建一份报告
